parents.subject: LU-19501 mdd: check target in mdd_changelog_ns_store

commit.subject: LU-19523 ldiskfs: fix format errors on RHEL8 aarch64
commit.message:
LU-19523 ldiskfs: fix format errors on RHEL8 aarch64

This patch fixes build errors on RHEL8 aarch64:
ldiskfs/mballoc.c: In function ‘ldiskfs_seq_mb_stats_show’:
ldiskfs/mballoc.c:3091:32: error: format ‘%llu’ expects argument of type
‘long long unsigned int’, but argument 3 has type ‘long int’ [-Werror=format=]
  seq_printf(seq, "\t\thits: %llu\n", atomic64_read(&sbi->s_bal_cX_hits[0]));
                             ~~~^
                             %lu

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 1534c43ccb ("LU-14438 ldiskfs: backport ldiskfs mballoc patches")
Change-Id: Ie5c19df8c12fd90380da84bfae781bbe5cbb3ee4
Signed-off-by: Alex Deiter <adeiter@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62054
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
